title: File:Anthem of the Seas (ship, 2015) at Liverpool 2021-6.jpg
description: Side view of Anthem of the Seas at Liverpool Cruise Terminal, August 26, 2021 — full broadside with the iconic North Star observation pod visible above the deck, 'ANTHEM of the Seas' nameplate clear on the hull, Liverpool waterfront skyline behind.
